text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I can still taste that smooth, melt-in-your-mouth custard 
and slightly bitter espresso… I can't believe they let us 
have as much tiramisu as we wanted!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The souvenir shop also sells them, so I'm definitely going to buy 
some before we head home! Hehe, I hope the others will like it♪
Stop it right there, Sweep!
(Wham!)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Eek!?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Owww…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I-I'm so sorry! Are you okay? …Wait, Spe?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What?! You chased after us by foot?! I'm sorry! 
We didn't notice you at all!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no, you're fine. I'm sure no one would've 
thought we'd literally come running here…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I was planning to head back once I managed to catch her, but it's ridiculous how slippery she is… Sigh…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-You've sure had it rough…

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should just forget about going back and do 
my running here. What's the training like here?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: …Train… ing?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen actually invited me to come too, so I've been 
curious about it. It doesn't look like there's even a track 
here, but… Huh? Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Training!!!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Whoa!?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I… came here… for training! What have I been doing?!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh… Don't tell me… you're just remembering this now?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, you don't have to rub salt in my wounds! Ugh, this is 
no time to be swooning over melt-in-your-mouth custard! 
I'm such a big, big dummy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll waste all my time goofing off at this rate! Hold on, 
I'm going to ask Maruzen where I can go to train here!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
H-Hey, are you all right? Maybe you should 
take a deep breath and… Wait, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back♪ How was the tiramisu? 
Oh! Scarlet, you came!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Umm, I… I have to train right now! If I don't…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, the spell on you has broken!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Maruzen!? You're terrible! I can't believe you really lied to me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, no need to be mad. It's true that this place 
can help pull you out of your rut!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was planning on telling you this later, but it's fine. 
Come close and listen to my story, would you?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ngh… O-Okay!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well… a long time ago, I also once pushed myself 
too hard because I wanted to live up to the expectations 
of those around me.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was overthinking everything so much that it ended up 
getting in the way of my running…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! You went through the same thing too?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I did. That's when my mother 
brought me here, to Bubblyland.

text_block_list.name: Young Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this is a pool resort! You said we'd be going 
to a training facility. How could you lie to me?!

text_block_list.name: Young Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
My race is next week! I don't have time 
to fool around in place like this!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just humor me and give this place a try! 
Letting your hair down is exactly what you need right now!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was still skeptical, but I had no other choice, so I danced at 
the disco, played in the pool, and spent all day having fun…

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Before I knew it, I forgot all about the outside world and lost 
myself in having fun. The worries weighing on my mind and body 
disappeared, and when I ran my race the following week…

text_block_list.name: Young Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!
(Wooooo!)

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I remembered how to run again, as if all my struggles 
had been but a dream.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky's Mother
text_block_list.text: See? Mom does take care of you after all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
…When I saw you two struggling, I thought maybe you were 
going through the same thing I did when I was younger. 
That's why I brought you here.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I had a feeling that if you both allowed yourselves to reset 
your minds and bodies like I had, then perhaps you would 
be able to get back on track…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Like you…

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (…Huh?)
Special Week brings her hands to her chest… and freezes.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: …Spe? You okay?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Oh, I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Um… Well, the thing is… I guess, maybe? 
I might be feeling a bit better…?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I… I haven't done anything to solve my problem, but for 
some reason, my mind… kind of feels at ease!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wonderful! That's a good thing! You must be finally starting 
to relax. I'm sure things will start falling into place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Huh? I feel like I've heard that before…)

text_block_list.name: Spe's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Just trust me! Give it a try. Let go of aaall your worries for 
a while and you might just find that it solves your problem.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (I get it now. This is what Mom was trying to tell me.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I didn't understand her at all then… But it's like Maruzen 
is saying — I had total tunnel vision.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: …I'll have to apologize to her once I get back.
Special Week clenches her fist.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, I've made up my mind… 
I'm going to give Bubblyland a shot!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: That's what I like to hear!
